series_metadata.series_title: Children’s Trust Fund Child Advocacy Center Files
series_metadata.series_description: Child Advocacy Center(CAC) Start-Up files include copies of request for applications, grant applications, grant agreements, scoring tools, award letters, progress reports, and related e-mail and correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 4 years and 1year in records center, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office 4 years and 1year in records center, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
